groups.title: Enquiry about Childcare Centre
groups.desc:
Questions 1-10
Complete the notes below.
Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.collect: About the Fees For short-day caring: • 1 $1$ for children under 2 years old. • Meals aren't included. • There are $2$ hours of free caring (one week). About the Centre • The centre has its own playground and offers outdoor $3$. • Teachers in the centre have experience in $4$ teaching. • Like other centres, it has a weekly $5$. • The earliest month child can join is $6$. About the Staff • For some activities, the staff need to bring $7$, sunglasses and sun cream. • They also should bring a $8$ for each child. • All staff have to provide a medical $9$ from the doctor. Contact Details • Address: NO.75, $10$ Avenue, Walkley • Phone number: 4789 6354

questions.title: There are 【   】 hours of free caring (one week).
The centre has its own playground and offers outdoor 【   】.
Teachers in the centre have experience in 【   】 teaching.
Like other centres, it has a weekly 【   】.
The earliest month child can join is 【   】.
For some activities, the staff need to bring 【   】, sunglasses and sun cream.
They also should bring a 【   】 for each child.
All staff have to provide a medical 【   】 from the doctor.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Welcome to the Early Learning Childcare Centre.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: How can I help you?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Good morning.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I came across the advertisement for your childcare centre last week, and I'm calling to get some details.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I'm thinking of enrolling my daughter.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: What do you want to know, sir?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Well, I've learnt from the brochure that there are different types of caring, and I'm interested in the short-day one.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: How much is the cost?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Well, it depends on the age of your child.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: For children over the age of two, we charge 30 dollars a day, and for those younger than two, you have to pay 37.50 dollars.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Does it include meals?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Well, I'm afraid not.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: You have to pay extra for them.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: But we offer you free care for 20 hours weekly.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: It used to be 10 hours, but this month, we extended the length of time as a special offer for our clients.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Oh, that will be of great help.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, that's about the fee.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then may I know more about your centre, something about the children's activities, the staff etc.?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: We offer a diversity of indoor activities, which cater for children of different ages, for example, paintings with watercolours, singing, dancing, games etc.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Moreover, when the weather is good, we always take children to our playground and organize different programmes in the open air.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's great!

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Outdoor activities are essential for children.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What about the teachers?

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Are they experienced?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Of course!

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: All teachers in our centre have relevant working experience of at least three years and specialize in primary school education.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Great!

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then they must be professional in dealing with children.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Another thing is, I've heard from other parents that they can receive a report from their caring centres every weekend about how their children perform during that week, and I wonder, is there anything like that in your centre?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Yes, we provide that too.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Great!

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Then I want to enrol my daughter as soon as possible.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Well, I'm afraid we have no vacancy at the moment, and you can't join until the beginning of September because one child will finish caring at the end of August.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I see.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Then I will talk about our staff.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: All of our centre's members are well trained so that they will take care of your children in every aspect.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: For example, when doing activities with special needs, our staff will prepare all the necessities for children, like aprons in the painting class, sunglasses and sun cream when playing outside in a sunny day.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: It's great that you can consider that.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I thought we had to prepare for these by ourselves.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: You must provide something - a family photo.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Many children may miss their parents, especially during the first week, so our staff will take photos of every child in case they need them.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Right.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Apart from the professional knowledge of caring, are there any other requirements for your staff?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Well, actually, when we do the recruitment, the priority we consider is the general health of the staff, so each applicant must provide a health certificate from the doctor.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Yes, I agree it's essential.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: I've learned about your centre and am pretty interested.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: But I still have to discuss it with my wife.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Of course.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Then I'll give you the contact detail of our centre, and if you want to register, you can call us or even have a visit if you like.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: What's your address?

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: It's NO.75, Calliope Avenue, that's C-A-double L-I-O-P-E, Walkley.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK, NO.75, Calliope Avenue.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: And the telephone number is 4789 6354.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: OK.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: That's everything I want to know.

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Thank you very much.

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: You are welcome!

transcript.speaker: Director
transcript.en: Bye!

transcript.speaker: Man
transcript.en: Bye!

1.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 short-day caring；提示词为 $、under 2 years old，此处应填数字，且符合题干 under 2 years old 这个要求。
题目解析：本题需通过前文信息定位，考生可先听到 short-day (caring)，其后听到 children over the age of two 的费用为 30，不符合题干要求。随后听到 younger than two，是题干 under 2 years old 的同义替换，接着听到数字 37.50，即为该题答案。本题先是要求考生根据题干限定排除干扰信息，然后考查考生是否熟悉带有小数的价格单位的读法。

2.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 meals；提示词为 hours、free caring、one week，此处应填数字。
题目解析：前文信息 meals 讨论完后，听到 free care 这一提示信息，随后听到数字 20 hours 以及 weekly，确定 20 为该题答案。注意之后出现的干扰信息 10 hours，根据原文的 used to，可判断其为过去的时长，不符合题干要求。

3.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 playground；提示词为 outdoor，此处应填名词或名词短语。
题目解析：本题跟上一题间隔较长，但定位词是原词出现的，考生耐心听取就能定位到。此后可以听到符合题干要求的名词 programmes，其后的 in the open air 是题干 outdoor 的同义替换，也可进一步确定答案。注意美式拼写 programs 也是正确的。

4.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 teachers、experience；提示词为 in、teaching，此处应填名词或形容词来搭配 teaching。
题目解析：定位词 teachers 由男士提出，随后女士提到 experience，可准确定位，接着可听到 primary school 搭配 education 出现，其中 education 是题干 teaching 的同义替换，可确定 primary school 为正确答案。

5.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 other centres、weekly；提示词为 like、weekly，此处应填名词。
题目解析：定位词 other centres 通过 other parents、their caring centres 体现出来，在此期间可听到符合题干要求的 report 出现，先记录下来，随后出现 every weekend、week 等信息，符合题干 weekly 的要求，可确定答案。

6.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 earliest、is，此处应填月份，且符合题干 earliest 的限定要求。
题目解析：上一题结束后，考生可根据本题答案要求直接听取月份。原文提到“... you can't join until the beginning of September ...”，其中 not ... until 意为“直到……才”，可确定 September 为正确答案。注意随后出现的干扰信息 August，原文说的是“其中一个孩子将在 8 月底结束托管”。

7.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 staff、activities；提示词为 bring、sunglasses、sun cream，此处应填物品类的名词或名词短语，且与 sunglasses、sun cream 存在并列关系。
题目解析：定位词 staff 和 activities 原词重现，接着可听到符合题干搭配要求的 aprons 一词，可先记录下来，随后听到其他提示信息 sunglasses 和 sun cream，可确定答案。

8.analysis:
听前预测：提示词为 bring、a、each child，此处应填单数名词或名词短语，表示携带的物品。
题目解析：定位信息不明显，考生可将对话角色的转换作为内容的推进信号。女士介绍员工会准备的物品后，男士回道“It's great that you can consider that.”，表明上一题结束。接着女士提到“You must provide something ...”，提示本题已开始，准备抓听符合该题搭配的信息，随后听到 family photo，符合题干要求，可先记录下来，接着 take、every child 先后出现，对应题干提示信息，可确定 family photo 为正确答案。

9.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 all staff、doctor；提示词为 medical，此处应填名词。
题目解析：本题可以通过提问辅助定位。上一题结束后，男士问道“... are there any other requirements for your staff?”随后女士答道：“... each applicant must provide a health certificate from the doctor.”，其中 each applicant 替换了题干 all staff，health 替换了 medical，doctor 原词重现，可确定 certificate 为正确答案。该题根据常识还是比较好理解的，入职托儿所通常都需要提供有医生证明的健康证。

10.analysis:
听前预测：定位词为 Address、NO.75；提示词为 Address、Avenue，此处应填街道名称。
题目解析：本题无干扰信息，难度不大。定位词原词重现，考生根据原文报出的字母拼写即可。注意 double L 连读的发音，建议先听取 Calliope 的完整发音。
